raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "California's AB 793 establishes the country's first law requiring manufacturers to include recycled materials in plastic beverage bottles.",
    "The bill mandates achieving a minimum recycled content of 50% by 2030, the highest in the world.",
    "The minimum recycled content mandate of AB 793 surpasses the 30% requirement established by the European Union.",
    "The decline in U.S. demand for recycled plastic has contributed to numerous recycling center closures in California.",
    "China and other overseas markets have significantly reduced their purchases of California's recycled waste.",
    "Recyclable plastic is accumulating in warehouses and increasing the pollution in landfills.",
    "Naked Juice's use of plastic bottles made with 100% post-consumer recycled content since 2010 demonstrates that significant changes in recycled content can be achieved.",
    "Nestle Waters North America and Coca-Cola have committed to enhancing their use of recycled plastic in the coming years.",
    "If plastic production practices do not change, there is a prediction that by 2050 there will be more plastic than fish in the oceans."
  ]
}
```
